embeds.title: 📜 STRAP RP SERVER RULES
embeds.description: Welcome to **Strap RP**! Please read and follow these rules to ensure a fun, fair, and realistic roleplay environment for everyone.

fields.name: 1. 🚫 RDM & VDM
fields.value:
• **RDM (Random Deathmatch):** Attacking or killing players without a valid roleplay reason and initiation.
• **VDM (Vehicle Deathmatch):** Using any vehicle as a weapon to run over players or ram other cars.

fields.name: 2. 🧠 Metagaming & Powergaming
fields.value:
• **Metagaming:** Using out-of-character (OOC) info (like stream snipes, Discord chat) in-character.
• **Powergaming:** Performing physical actions that are impossible, or forcing roleplay on others without giving them a chance to react.

fields.name: 3. 🎭 FailRP & NLR (New Life Rule)
fields.value:
• **FailRP:** Unrealistic actions (e.g. driving sports cars up mountains, not valuing your life when held at gunpoint).
• **NLR:** If you die, you forget all events leading to your death and cannot return to that area for 15 minutes.

fields.name: 4. 🚔 Cop Baiting
fields.value: • Do not intentionally provoke police officers (e.g., drifting in front of them, running red lights repeatedly) just to start a chase.

fields.name: 5. 🤝 Respect & Community
fields.value: • Toxic behavior, hate speech, or harassment OOC is strictly bannable. Keep it in-character, respect fellow players, and enjoy the RP!
